shortDescription: Spacious 1-bedroom condo in CityPlace with open layout, balcony, and underground parking.
fullDescription: Welcome to 55 Bremner Boulevard, Unit 3201 in the vibrant CityPlace neighbourhood. This well-appointed condominium suite delivers effortless urban living with premium amenities. The main living area showcases original architectural details alongside tasteful modern updates. The kitchen features modern finishes including a gas range, integrated dishwasher, and pantry storage. All 1 bedrooms are generously sized, and the primary offers a spa-inspired four-piece ensuite. Additional highlights include in-suite laundry, ample storage, and energy-efficient mechanicals. Enjoy a 90+ walk score with parks, cafes, schools, and transit all within minutes.
keyFeatures: Steps to TTC subway and streetcar
Open kitchen with waterfall island and pot lights
